# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure CI/CD Pipeline with Safe Logging

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  APP_NAME: my-application
  BUILD_ENV: production
  LOG_LEVEL: debug

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log safe build context
        run: |
          echo "=== Safe Build Information ==="
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Commit Message: ${{ github.event.head_commit.message }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "Run Number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}"
          echo "Event Name: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Runner OS: ${{ runner.os }}"
          echo "Runner Arch: ${{ runner.arch }}"
          echo "Build Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          echo "App Name: ${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
          echo "Build Env: ${{ env.BUILD_ENV }}"
          echo "Log Level: ${{ env.LOG_LEVEL }}"

      - name: Log safe environment variables only
        run: |
          echo "=== Safe Environment Variables ==="
          echo "Logging only non-sensitive environment variables"
          echo "HOME: $HOME"
          echo "PATH length: ${#PATH}"
          echo "SHELL: $SHELL"
          echo "RUNNER_TEMP: $RUNNER_TEMP"
          echo "RUNNER_WORKSPACE: $RUNNER_WORKSPACE"
          echo "GITHUB_WORKSPACE: $GITHUB_WORKSPACE"
          echo "NODE_VERSION: $(node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'not installed')"
          echo "NPM_VERSION: $(npm --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'not installed')"
          echo ""
          echo "WARNING: Never log secrets, tokens, API keys, passwords, or connection strings."
          echo "WARNING: Never run 'env' or 'printenv' unfiltered in CI logs."

      # SECURITY: Mask all secrets so they cannot appear in logs even accidentally
      - name: Register secret masks
        run: |
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}"
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.API_KEY }}"
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}"
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}"
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}"
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}"
          echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}"
          echo "All sensitive values have been registered with GitHub's log masking"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          echo "=== Installing Dependencies ==="
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee /tmp/npm-install.log
          echo "Install exit code: $?"
          echo "Total packages: $(cat package-lock.json | python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(data.get("packages",{})))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')"

      - name: Run linting
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Linter ==="
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee /tmp/lint.log || true
          LINT_EXIT=$?
          echo "Lint exit code: $LINT_EXIT"
          if [ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::warning::Linting found issues. Check the lint output above."
          fi

      - name: Run tests with safe logging
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Tests ==="
          npm test 2>&1 | tee /tmp/test.log || true
          TEST_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "Test exit code: $TEST_EXIT"
          echo "Test log size: $(wc -l < /tmp/test.log) lines"
          if [ $TEST_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Tests failed with exit code $TEST_EXIT"
            echo "=== Last 50 lines of test output ==="
            tail -50 /tmp/test.log
          fi

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          echo "=== Building Application ==="
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/build.log
          BUILD_EXIT=$?
          echo "Build exit code: $BUILD_EXIT"
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            echo "Build output size: $(du -sh dist/ | cut -f1)"
            echo "Build file count: $(find dist/ -type f | wc -l)"
          fi
          if [ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Build failed. Last 30 lines:"
            tail -30 /tmp/build.log
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Validate deployment configuration
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Configuration Validation ==="
          echo "Target environment: ${{ env.BUILD_ENV }}"
          echo "Deployment region: us-east-1"

          # Validate secrets are present WITHOUT logging their values
          echo "Checking required secrets are configured..."

          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::DEPLOY_TOKEN secret is not configured"
            exit 1
          else
            echo "✓ DEPLOY_TOKEN is configured (value masked)"
          fi

          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::DATABASE_URL secret is not configured"
            exit 1
          else
            echo "✓ DATABASE_URL is configured (value masked)"
          fi

          if [ -z "${{ secrets.API_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "::warning::API_KEY secret is not configured"
          else
            echo "✓ API_KEY is configured (value masked)"
          fi

          echo "All required deployment secrets are present."

      - name: Test database connectivity safely
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Database Connectivity Check ==="
          echo "Testing database connection..."

          # SECURITY: Never log the connection string
          # Only log success/failure and sanitized error messages
          if command -v pg_isready &> /dev/null; then
            # Extract only host for logging (no credentials)
            DB_HOST=$(echo "$DATABASE_URL" | sed -E 's|.*@([^:/]+).*|\1|' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
            echo "Connecting to database host: $DB_HOST"

            pg_isready -d "$DATABASE_URL" -t 10 2>&1 | grep -v "$DATABASE_URL" || true
            echo "Connection test completed"
          else
            echo "pg_isready not available, skipping direct connection test"
          fi

      - name: Deploy application
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Deploying Application ==="
          echo "Deploy target: ${{ env.BUILD_ENV }}"
          echo "Deploy timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"

          # SECURITY: Log HTTP status codes and safe metadata only, never full API responses
          # API responses may contain tokens, internal URLs, or sensitive data
          DEPLOY_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/deploy_response.json -w "%{http_code}" \
            -X POST \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $DEPLOY_TOKEN" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d "{\"ref\": \"${{ github.sha }}\", \"environment\": \"${{ env.BUILD_ENV }}\"}" \
            "https://api.example.com/deploy" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")

          echo "Deployment API HTTP status: $DEPLOY_STATUS"

          if [ "$DEPLOY_STATUS" -ge 200 ] && [ "$DEPLOY_STATUS" -lt 300 ]; then
            echo "✓ Deployment request accepted"
            # Log only safe fields from response, never the full response
            if [ -f /tmp/deploy_response.json ]; then
              echo "Deploy ID: $(python3 -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("/tmp/deploy_response.json")); print(data.get("deploy_id", "N/A"))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')"
              echo "Status: $(python3 -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("/tmp/deploy_response.json")); print(data.get("status", "N/A"))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')"
            fi
          else
            echo "::error::Deployment failed with HTTP status $DEPLOY_STATUS"
            # SECURITY: Only log safe error fields, not the full response body
            if [ -f /tmp/deploy_response.json ]; then
              echo "Error type: $(python3 -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("/tmp/deploy_response.json")); print(data.get("error_code", "unknown"))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')"
              echo "Error message: $(python3 -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("/tmp/deploy_response.json")); print(data.get("message", "no message"))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'no message')"
            fi
            exit 1
          fi

          # SECURITY: Clean up response files that may contain sensitive data
          rm -f /tmp/deploy_response.json

      - name: Post-deployment health check
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
        run: |
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Health Check ==="
          echo "Waiting 30 seconds for deployment to stabilize..."
          sleep 30

          HEALTH_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
            "https://app.example.com/health" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")

          echo "Health check HTTP status: $HEALTH_STATUS"

          if [ "$HEALTH_STATUS" -eq 200 ]; then
            echo "✓ Application is healthy"
          else
            echo "::warning::Health check returned status $HEALTH_STATUS"
          fi

      - name: Upload safe build logs as artifact
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            /tmp/npm-install.log
            /tmp/lint.log
            /tmp/test.log
            /tmp/build.log
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Clean up sensitive files
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning Up Sensitive Files ==="
          rm -f /tmp/deploy_response.json
          rm -f ~/.npmrc
          rm -f .env .env.local .env.production
          echo "Cleanup completed"

      - name: Generate build summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Repository | ${{ github.repository }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Branch | ${{ github.ref_name }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Actor | ${{ github.actor }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Run ID | ${{ github.run_id }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Timestamp | $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "> **Security Note**: Secrets, API keys, tokens, connection strings, and full API responses are never logged." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
